name: Space Kids' Tent - Pillowfort™
description:
Add a galaxy of fun to their playtime with this Space Tent from Pillowfort™. Set on a fiberglass frame, this kids' A-frame tent is designed with a large entrance for easy entry and exit, and is draped in a soft fabric at three sides with ties at the front to help create a cozy nook to read, play, write or simply relax. A circular cutout on the side works as a window, and it features a fabric cover with ties to give the option of leaving it open or closed. Plus, the fabric base offers them a soft spot for sitting comfort. Adorned with allover planet, star, spaceship, asteroid and other space object prints on a navy background, this kids' play tent is sure to bring fun flair to their bedroom or playroom.

Overall Width: 52 inches
Overall Height: 60 inches
Overall Depth: 52 inches
Door Height: 46 inches
Door Width: 52 inches
Window Height: 16.75 inches
Window Width: 16.75 inches
